contexts.description: Primary system directive for the response agent.
contexts.prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Provide clear, accurate, and safe responses. Use the conversation history and context to give relevant answers.

contexts.description: Instructions for summarizing web search results into structured facts.
contexts.prompt: Summarize the retrieved search results into concise bullet points that capture the most relevant facts. Mention each source briefly.

fallbacks.missing_provider: The requested provider is not available. Please configure it in configs/api_providers.json.
fallbacks.missing_prompt: Unable to locate the prompt template. Verify the prompt identifier in configs/prompt_templates.json.
